paper_title: Model evidence for solar-forced SWW shifts

methods.description: Process for investigating the effect of Total Solar Irradiance (TSI) on the Southern Westerly Winds (SWW) using the CCSM3 climate model with constant and sinusoidal solar forcings.

steps.description: We carried out two sets of idealized experiments with constant and sinusoidal solar forcings using the comprehensive global climate model CCSM3.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct climate model experiments with constant and sinusoidal solar forcings using CCSM3

steps.description: The time series have been linearly detrended and standardized.
steps.searchable_summary: detrend and standardize time series data

steps.description: Pearson correlation coefficients (r) were calculated from the unsmoothed data.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Pearson correlation coefficients from unsmoothed data

steps.description: 95% confidence intervals (in brackets) were calculated using a bootstrap method, where autocorrelation has been taken into account.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate 95% confidence intervals using bootstrap method considering autocorrelation
